sourcePrompt: A PBR river patrol boat of the Brown Water Navy, about nine and a half meters of low fiberglass hull with no propellers - water-jet nozzles tuck under the flat stern. A circular gun tub sunk into the foredeck mounts twin .50 caliber machine guns; amidships an open conning station with a low windshield and a small radar mast on a frame above; a single machine gun mounts at the stern. Low freeboard the whole length, built to run shallow. Olive-drab and black, fast and mean.
